summary: Iteration 13 - All 19 backend tests pass. Tested: Google OAuth endpoints, PUT /api/clients/{user_id}, GET /api/reports/financial-summary, Mercado Pago Pix payments (graceful error handling), Web-client serving. Fixed missing expo-auth-session dependency in mobile frontend.
critical_code_review_comments: Google OAuth: GET /api/auth/google-client-id returns empty clientId (expected - GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID not configured in .env)
Google OAuth: POST /api/auth/google correctly validates tokens and returns 401 for invalid tokens
PUT /api/clients/{user_id}: Works correctly with barber auth, returns 404 for invalid user_id, returns 401 without auth
Financial Reports: GET /api/reports/financial-summary returns comprehensive data (monthly breakdown, avg ticket, top services)
Mercado Pago: All payment endpoints gracefully return 400 with 'Mercado Pago nao configurado' when MERCADOPAGO_TOKEN is empty
Webhook endpoint: POST /api/payments/webhook/mercadopago accepts payloads and handles invalid JSON gracefully
Web-client Login: Shows 'Entrar com Google' fallback button when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is empty
Web-client Pix: Shows 'Gerar QR Code Pix' button with proper error handling when MP_TOKEN not set
Mobile Frontend: Fixed missing expo-auth-session dependency - installed via yarn

success_rate.frontend: Web-client 100% working, Mobile expo tunnel having ngrok connectivity issues (infrastructure)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 13 tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration13_features.py cover: health check, Google OAuth (google-client-id endpoint, POST /api/auth/google), PUT /api/clients/{user_id} for editing clients, GET /api/reports/financial-summary, Mercado Pago Pix payments (create-pix, webhook), Web-client serving. IMPORTANT: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and MERCADOPAGO_TOKEN are empty in .env - endpoints return graceful errors. expo-auth-session package was installed for mobile frontend. Expo tunnel has ngrok connectivity issues (infrastructure, not code).

tested_features.GET /api/web/login: PASS - Page loads with Google login button (fallback)
tested_features.GET /api/web/pagamento-pix: PASS - Page loads with Pix payment UI

mocked_apis_note: Google OAuth (GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID empty in .env - falls back to Emergent auth button), Mercado Pago (MERCADOPAGO_TOKEN empty in .env - returns graceful error). Both are expected behaviors.

dependency_fix.action: Installed correct version via yarn add expo-auth-session@~7.0.10 (compatible with expo 54.x)
dependency_fix.reason: Mobile frontend AuthContext.tsx imports from expo-auth-session/providers/google

infrastructure_notes: Expo/ngrok tunnel having connectivity issues (external service problem, not code). Web-client served via FastAPI at /api/web/ is working correctly.
